articles.title: Naqi Logix Appoints Dino Mariutti to the Board of Directors to Drive Strategic Growth
articles.description: Experienced entrepreneur, investor, and global operations leader joins Board to support the company's next phase of growth and commercialization
articles.content: Experienced entrepreneur, investor, and global operations leader joins Board to support the companys next phase of growth and commercialization VANCOUVER, BC, CANADA, June 29, 2026 / EINPresswire.co… [+6953 chars]
